data.headline: Portfolio Flat vs SPY +0.05% — No Trades Executed
data.summary: Portfolio returned 0.00% while SPY benchmark returned +0.05%, resulting in alpha of -0.05%. No trades were executed today. Cash position remains at $1,000,000 with zero holdings. The underperformance reflects the cash drag against a positive market day.
data.risk_note: Portfolio holds 100% cash. Full market exposure is foregone; vulnerability to further upside participation if positions remain undeployed.
